title: First compaction in a session — anchor body equals serialised tail (no prefix)
scenario: Fresh session, no prior anchor. Ten user/assistant rounds accumulate. tryNarrative fires for the first time with enableDialogRedactionAnchor=true.

input.preCompactionStream: 10 alternating user/assistant rounds, mixed text + reasoning + completed tool calls

title: Subsequent compaction — anchor body equals prevBody + serialised tail
scenario: Latest anchor[n] has body 'Round 1 through Round 15'. Twenty new messages exist after anchor[n]. tryNarrative fires.

title: Spec 1 synergy — unanswered user msg excluded from extend
scenario: Post-anchor stream has 5 finished rounds + 1 unanswered user msg msg_X at tail (no completed-finish assistant child).

expectedOutput.spec1HelperRunsAfter: replays msg_X to msg_Y with id > anchor.id; msg_X removed
expectedOutput.modelSeesUnansweredUserMsg: exactly once (as msg_Y in post-anchor stream)

title: Recompress trigger — codex provider exceeds 50K ceiling
scenario: Codex session whose latest anchor body has 52,000 estimated tokens.

expectedOutput.anchorBodyAfterRecompress: LLM-distilled summary; in-place overwrite via STEP 3

title: Recompress trigger — non-codex provider exceeds 50K ceiling
scenario: Claude / openai session whose anchor body has 60,000 tokens.

expectedOutput.observedGateGone: rebind no longer skips recompress (was previously gated out)

title: post-anchor v7 — multi-task session continuity preserved
scenario: Post-anchor stream contains 3 prior user-task chains (each = user msg + multiple completed assistant turns).

postAnchorMessages: User msg 1 + 3 completed assistant turns (text + reasoning + tool calls)

v7Output.inFlightCarveOut: in-flight assistant's pending parts NOT redacted

expectedOutput.amnesiaLoop: does NOT reproduce — model can read prior assistant turns

title: Reasoning-only turn contributes to turnSummaries
scenario: Codex assistant message with parts [reasoning, tool_call, tool_call] and no text part. Memory.read processes it.

expectedOutput.preFixSymptom: this turn invisible to renderForHumanSync; legacy tryNarrative would skip it

title: Feature flag off — atomic rollback to pre-fix behaviour
scenario: enableDialogRedactionAnchor=false. tryNarrative + post-anchor + scheduleHybridEnrichment all fall back.

expectedOutput.comment: Single flag flip reverts ALL four patches atomically

title: Tool args truncation
scenario: Tool call with state.input that JSON-stringifies to 800 chars.

title: Recall round-trip verified end-to-end
scenario: Anchor body contains `recall_id: prt_abc123`. Model emits recall_toolcall_raw({part_id: 'prt_abc123'}).

expectedOutput.recallResult: original tool output text (the raw payload that was redacted from anchor body)
expectedOutput.ledgerLookup: working-cache.deriveLedger walks Session.messages, finds part with id prt_abc123, returns state.output

title: Stale anchor — interloper compaction wrote newer anchor before recompress
scenario: Recompress dispatched for anchor[n]; concurrent compaction wrote anchor[n+1] before our async recompress reaches its in-place update step.

telemetry.comment: recompress aborts cleanly; anchor[n] is no longer load-bearing anyway

title: Cold start — empty session, no messages yet
scenario: tryNarrative is somehow invoked on a session with no messages (defensive case).

title: Tool with status=pending NOT redacted
scenario: v7 transformPostAnchorTail encounters a tool part with state.status=pending (in-flight).

title: Round numbering across recompressed boundary (OQ-1)
scenario: Anchor[n] body was just recompressed by /responses/compact. Next extend appends 5 new messages.

input.recompressedAnchorBody: LLM summary text (## Round N markers may or may not survive)

optionA.parsedLastRound: from LLM summary if present (e.g. 47 → next is 48)

optionB.parsedLastRound: from CompactionPart.lastRound metadata if option A fails

expectedOutput.fallback: if neither works, reset to '## Round 1' (acceptable but logged)
expectedOutput.decisionPoint: M4 implementation; refer to handoff.md OQ-1
